import React,{useState,useEffect,useRef}from'react';import InventoryManager from'./InventoryManager';import{jsx as _jsx,jsxs as _jsxs}from"react/jsx-runtime";function App(){const[menuOpen,setMenuOpen]=useState(false);const[currentCategory,setCurrentCategory]=useState('drinks');const menuRef=useRef();const buttonRef=useRef();const handleCategoryChange=category=>{setCurrentCategory(category);setMenuOpen(false);};const handleMenuClick=()=>{if(!menuOpen){setMenuOpen(true);}};const handleCloseMenu=()=>{setMenuOpen(false);};// Handle clicks outside the menu
useEffect(()=>{const handleClickOutside=event=>{if(menuOpen&&menuRef.current&&!menuRef.current.contains(event.target)&&!buttonRef.current.contains(event.target)){setMenuOpen(false);}};document.addEventListener('mousedown',handleClickOutside);document.addEventListener('touchstart',handleClickOutside);return()=>{document.removeEventListener('mousedown',handleClickOutside);document.removeEventListener('touchstart',handleClickOutside);};},[menuOpen]);return/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{className:"app",children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{className:"header",children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("h1",{children:"Bar Inventory"}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("button",{ref:buttonRef,className:"menu-button ".concat(menuOpen?'open':''),onClick:menuOpen?handleCloseMenu:handleMenuClick,children:/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{className:"menu-button-icon",children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("span",{}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("span",{}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("span",{})]})})]}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("div",{className:"menu-overlay ".concat(menuOpen?'open':''),children:/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{className:"menu-card",ref:menuRef,children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("button",{className:currentCategory==='drinks'?'active':'',onClick:()=>handleCategoryChange('drinks'),children:"Drinks"}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("button",{className:currentCategory==='tea'?'active':'',onClick:()=>handleCategoryChange('tea'),children:"Tea"}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("button",{className:currentCategory==='sirup'?'active':'',onClick:()=>handleCategoryChange('sirup'),children:"Monin Sirup"})]})}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx(InventoryManager,{category:currentCategory})]});}export default App;
